name: codex-chatcut
description: Run the real OpenChatCut editor inside Codex with no second chat.

interface.shortDescription: Use the real OpenChatCut editor from your Codex task.
interface.longDescription: Codex ChatCut launches a windowless OpenChatCut sidecar, opens its editor-only mode inside Codex, and proxies its native editor tools while Codex remains the sole conversational agent.
defaultPrompt: Edit the selected ChatCut timeline items.
